context: Evaluates whether the oracle tool correctly implements the three-action Discord entity lookup system with both ID-based and fuzzy-search modes. This tool extends the AI's awareness of the Discord server at runtime, enabling context-aware responses.

checklist.name: Tool definition with zod schema
checklist.description: The oracle is defined using the Vercel AI SDK's `tool()` helper with a zod schema that includes the `action` discriminator and action-specific fields (`id`, `query`, `channelId`, `limit`).

checklist.name: Messages action
checklist.description: The `messages` action correctly fetches a single message by ID (returning content, author, reactions, etc.) or performs a fuzzy search of recent messages by content/author returning up to `limit` results.

checklist.name: Channels action
checklist.description: The `channels` action returns detailed channel info by ID (name, type, topic, position) or fuzzy-searches guild channels by name.

checklist.name: Users action
checklist.description: The `users` action returns detailed member info by ID (username, displayName, roles, presence) or fuzzy-searches members by username, displayName, and role names.

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: When a requested entity is not found (by ID), the tool returns an error object (e.g. `{ error: '...' }`) rather than throwing an exception.
